name: Dont Get Caught!
description: Cheating on a test is an art! Drop your head, open your phone, and tap the answers. The most important thing – dont let the teacher catch you! His anger bar fills up when: You take too long to answer You answer incorrectly The teacher looks at you while youre staring at your phone If the anger bar fills completely – you get an F and eternal shame! There are brainrots sitting in the classroom – theyll try to distract you. Dont fall for it! 20 levels of difficulty: 1–5 – Easy 6–10 – Medium 11–15 – Hard 16–19 – Very Hard 20 – Final Boss Test
instructions: Head Controls W ndash look up watch the teacher S ndash look down look at your phone On the Phone Bottom button ndash look down at your phone and tap Get Answer Top button ndash look up and hide your phone
